summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard excerpt captures a rocking Saturday night with Jerry in top form.
review: Both reviewers praise the excellent sound quality of this soundboard excerpt, noting that the two‑and‑a‑half songs are crystal clear and “rocking.”  The performance is described as strong – especially for a 1995 show that many fans dismiss – and the recording’s fidelity makes it worth listening despite its brevity.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave high star ratings (4 and 5) and highlighted superb audio quality plus strong playing, leading to a rating in the upper‑range of good–great shows.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the excerpt as having crystal‑clear, crisp audio with no noticeable flaws; the soundboard source provides a clean mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The excerpt captures roughly two and a half songs from an otherwise full Saturday night set; it starts powerfully but ends abruptly, leaving listeners wanting the rest of the show.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Title hints that Jerry was 'with it', implying strong guitar work during this segment.
